testcase.name: test_quote_accept_requires_quote_id

failure.message: assert (True is not True or 'error' in "{'ok': true, 'invoice': {'id': '976b8fdb-d66b-471a-be01-54f41edf9214', 'invoice_number': 'kon-inv-20260324125041', 'customer_id': none, testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_payments_governance_pack.py:623: in test_quote_accept_requires_quote_id assert data.get("ok") is not True or "error" in str(data).lower() or data.get("invoice") is
